allow: Bash(wmic process where processid=5560 get name,commandline 2>&1 | head -5)
Bash(docker stop ptitdate-mysql ptitdate-redis 2>/dev/null && docker rm ptitdate-mysql ptitdate-redis 2>/dev/null && echo "Done! Stopped ptitdate containers")
Bash(net stop mysql 2>&1 || net stop mysql80 2>&1 || echo "Try manual: Open Services.msc > Find MySQL > Stop")
Bash(sleep 15 && docker exec hypermall-mysql-dev mysqladmin ping -h localhost -u root -proot 2>&1)
Bash(docker exec hypermall-mysql-dev mysql -u root -proot -e "SHOW DATABASES;" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName" 2>&1 || echo "No Java processes")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force" 2>&1; echo "Killed old Java processes")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force" 2>&1 && echo "Stopped all Java processes")

Bash(docker exec hypermall-mysql-dev mysql -u root -proot -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS hypermall_inventory; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS hypermall_shipping; SHOW DATABASES LIKE 'hypermall%';" 2>&1)
Bash(docker exec hypermall-mysql-dev mysql -uroot -proot -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS hypermall_ai; SHOW DATABASES LIKE 'hypermall%';" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8081/api/auth/register \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"email":"aitest2@test.com","password":"Test123!","fullName":"AI Tester"}' 2>&1 -v 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(docker exec hypermall-mysql-dev mysql -uroot -proot -e "USE hypermall_users; SELECT id, email, full_name FROM users LIMIT 5;" 2>&1)
Bash(docker exec hypermall-mysql-dev mysql -uroot -proot -e "USE hypermall_users; SELECT email, password FROM users WHERE id=2;" 2>&1)
Bash(docker exec hypermall-mysql-dev mysql -uroot -proot -e "USE hypermall_users; SELECT id, email, role, status FROM users;" 2>&1)
